name: Watchdog
effect: Trips the system alarm the instant an intruder is detected — no teeth of its own.

name: Hidden Virtue
effect: A concealed sentry that spots cloaked runners without announcing itself.

name: SeeYa
effect: Detects intruders. A modified 'Sawtooth Brain Wave' read tells an AI (sawtooth) from a human (sinusoid).

name: Speedtrap
effect: A fast trip-alarm — hard to slip past once you are in range.

name: Bloodhound
effect: Detects and TRACES the runner back toward his physical position. Must trace before you jack out.

name: Pit Bull
effect: Traces the runner AND cuts the line behind him, stranding him in the fort.

name: Manticore
effect: Anti-IC: de-rezzes hostile programs (specialises in killing Demons).

name: Hydra
effect: Anti-IC of middling strength — chews through a runner's loaded programs.

name: Dragon
effect: Heavy Anti-IC — strips a runner's arsenal one program at a time.

name: Killer II
effect: Attacks other programs; STR to 0 = de-rezzed (destroyed).

name: Killer IV
effect: A stronger Killer — reliably de-rezzes mid-tier runner programs.

name: Killer VI
effect: Top-tier Killer — few loaded programs survive a solid hit.

name: Aardvark
effect: Hunts and kills Worms burrowing through the walls.

name: Krash
effect: Attacks the deck/system itself, crashing programs.

name: Flatline
effect: Kills the runner's Interface — knocks him off the deck.

name: Poison Flatline
effect: Kills the deck memory AND fries the hardware — real damage to the machine.

name: Stun
effect: Black ICE: freezes the runner 1D6 turns. Nullified through a keyboard interface.

name: Knockout
effect: Black ICE: drops the runner into a coma (1D6 hours).

name: Jack Attack
effect: Black ICE: prevents the runner from logging off — pins him for the kill.

name: Glue
effect: Black ICE (NetWatch arrest tool): freezes the runner and traces his Realspace position.

name: Sword
effect: Black ICE: 1D6 real damage per hit through the neural link.

name: Hellbolt
effect: Black ICE: 1D10 physical damage to the runner.

name: Firestarter
effect: Black ICE: surges the deck into a real fire — hardware damage and worse.

name: Brainwipe
effect: Black ICE: -1D6 INT per turn; at 0 the runner dies, INT lost forever.

name: Zombie
effect: Black ICE: -1D6 INT, leaving the runner an imbecile.

name: Liche
effect: Black ICE: erases the runner's memory and implants a pseudo-personality.

name: Hellhound
effect: Black ICE (mobile): hunts, waits, deals 2D10, traces, and pursues for years. Patrols up to 1 case outside the walls.

name: Viddy Master
effect: Drives cameras and video remotes — the fort's eyes in Realspace.

name: Hotwire
effect: Seizes vehicles and machinery wired to the fort.

name: Genie
effect: A general-purpose Controller — takes most remotes on the fort's net.

name: Soundmachine
effect: Drives microphones and speakers — the fort's ears and voice.

name: Open Sesame
effect: A weaker Controller for doors and elevators.

name: Dee-2
effect: Operates robotics on the fort's net.

name: Crystal Ball
effect: Operates cameras and sensors.

name: DecKRASH
effect: Crashes a runner's cyberdeck for 1D6 turns.

name: Viral 15
effect: Randomly erases one file each turn until stopped.

name: Spazz
effect: Black ICE: halves the runner's REF for 1D6 turns.
